global.description: The ad features a mix of visual elements and text, promoting trending content with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Discover trending content and engage with it.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A solid color background occupying the top portion of the ad, providing a base for other elements.

elements.label: Main visual element
elements.description: A large, rectangular shape in the center, possibly representing a video or image placeholder.

elements.label: Secondary visual element
elements.description: Another rectangular shape overlapping the main visual element, suggesting additional content or imagery.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape positioned over the main visual element, indicating a focus on specific content.

elements.label: Content area
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area that may contain text or images, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Additional visual element
elements.description: A large rectangular shape that adds depth to the central area, possibly indicating more content.

elements.label: Content placeholder
elements.description: A smaller circular shape that may represent a profile picture or icon, located centrally.

elements.label: Additional overlay
elements.description: A rectangular shape that overlaps with other elements, suggesting more information or interaction.

elements.label: Trending text
elements.description: A small text area indicating trending content, positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: A small text area below the trending text, providing further context or information.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Watch what's trending Learn more', encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, labeled 'BingeLayer', representing the brand.

elements.label: User-generated content label
elements.description: A small text area labeled 'UGC' positioned near the top, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, trending content, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main visual elements are centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Watch what's trending, Learn more, BingeLayer, UGC
